stemHtml: The pilot of a modern commercial large turbojet sets the vertical speed mode of the autopilot to carry out a climb. What must he be particularly careful of?

options.a: The auto pilot may select a rate of climb outside the maximum permissible limit of the aeroplane.
options.b: If the climb is prolonged, there is a risk that the airspeed may reduce towards the stall.
options.c: The engines may overspeed as the autothrottle attempts to maintain airspeed.
options.d: The aeroplane may overspeed in an attempt to maintain the rate of climb.
